creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried building cad/brlcad, but the CMake stage works just fine for me.  Late it died with:

In file included from /usr/work/share/dim/ports/cad/brlcad/work/brlcad-7.24.0/src/libtclcad/tclcad.c:32:
/usr/local/include/tk8.6/tk.h:21:3: error: Tk 8.6 must be compiled with tcl.h from Tcl 8.6 or better
#       error Tk 8.6 must be compiled with tcl.h from Tcl 8.6 or better
        ^

but this error looks unrelated to clang.  (I have both tcl and tk 8.6 installed...)
